rollback_reason_not_chosen: No safe full restore available. All named backups predate P247G canonical table creation (draws_big_lotto_canonical_main). Restoring any backup would destroy the canonical table, causing a more severe regression than accepting the 5 legitimate draws.
why_not_rollback: All named backups (p247b, p213l, p213h, p188) predate P247G task (2026-06-06).
None of the backups contain the draws_big_lotto_canonical_main table.
A full restore from backup would: fix raw-row drift BUT destroy the canonical table, producing test_view_still_canonical failure of type 'table-not-found' instead of 'count mismatch'.
Surgical DELETE of 5 rows would require explicit DB write authorization in a separate task — not within scope of this verification.
All 5 inserted draws are confirmed plausible: dates 2026/06/04-2026/06/06, draw numbers sequential within each lottery type.
Decision: accept the drift, update P247G guard constants to the new legitimate baseline.

trigger.trigger_event: Fetcher repair session. lottery_api/fetcher/* restored (files had been accidentally deleted in commit 7306264). After endpoint was repaired and backend restarted, frontend auto-backfill feature triggered /api/ingest/backfill without dry_run=true.
trigger.triggered_by: Frontend auto-backfill (non-dry-run call). Worker verification calls were all dry_run=true.
trigger.fetcher_repair_status: UNMERGED — lottery_api/fetcher/* are untracked on branch p253g-feature-bottleneck-report-inventory. Not included in this acceptance PR.

inserted_draws.note: Sequential between 115000058 (2026/06/02) and 115000060. Draw number and date consistent with official schedule.
